chunks.title: Thanksgiving and God's Sovereignty
chunks.reason: The psalmist gives thanks for God's nearness and declares His power to judge the earth.

chunks.title: God's Judgment on the Proud
chunks.reason: A direct address from God commanding the boastful and wicked to cease their pride.

chunks.title: The Cup of Wrath and Exaltation
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision of the wicked drinking God's wrath while the righteous are exalted.
